free_text: Proton and deuteron activation measurements at the NPI
and future plans in SPIRAL2/NFS
U-120M cyclotron (20.0 MeV for
deuteron beam, 20.1 MeV for proton beam)
The high purity Zn, Fe (99.99% and 99.5% purity, 25 um
declared thickness) and Al (50 um declared thickness)
Zn or Fe foils interleaved with Al
monitors placed in a reaction chamber that serves
also as a Faraday cup.
The energy of reaction in subsequent foils was
calculated by using SRIM 2009 code.
Irradiated for 10.35 min with 0.328 uA mean
current for deuteron, and irradiated for 27 min with
0.292 uA mean beam current for proton.
Measured after several minutes after
irradiation
Two calibrated HPGe detectors of 50% efficiency
and of FWHM 1.8 keV at 1.3 MeV.
Thickness of each foil. The initial beam
energy uncertainty and spread are not included.
Total uncertainty from statistics of peak area
determination and
Beam current        (5%)
Foil thickness      (2%)
Detector efficiency (2%)
Fe(p,x)51Mn and Fe(p,x)58mCo preliminary cross sections
Data received from Eva Simeckova
Proof-read by Eva Simeckova (2018-05-11)
Received from Eva Simeckova by an email
